ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock (e.g., Apple Inc., Alphabet Inc.) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjclose_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, CSV, Database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price ratio record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price ratio */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Price ratio of the stock */,
  "price_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "price_book_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "price_sales_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-sales ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_ratios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_diffs" (
  "diff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price difference record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price difference */,
  "diff" REAL /* Price difference of the stock */,
  "price_diff_percentage" REAL /* Percentage difference in price */,
  "volume_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in trading volume */,
  "volume_diff_percentage" REAL /* Percentage difference in trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_diffs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during access (e.g., view price, add alert) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
